subject: SEO Update — ARLO — 2026-07-13
html:
Week 4: Whatagraph comparison page

Shipped the next comparison-hub page on the existing /compare template — same low-KD comparison term tier as AgencyAnalytics, positioned against Whatagraph's actual product (scheduled report delivery on top of dashboards) rather than a generic template swap.

PageWhat ChangedTarget KeywordCheck It
/compare/whatagraph-vs-arloNew comparison page — argues "no report template + delivery schedule to babysit" (Whatagraph's real differentiator is scheduled/automated report delivery, not just dashboards). FAQPage schema, honest tradeoff FAQ.whatagraph alternative (KD 7, 50/mo)askarlo.app/compare/whatagraph-vs-arlo
llms.txtAdded the new compare page to the Pages listAI citation coverageaskarlo.app/llms.txt

Skipped on purpose: the /compare index page (item 4 from last session) turned out to need real layout work — there's no existing hub-page pattern in the app to clone (services/connect are also just [slug] routes) — so it's flagged for its own session instead of a rushed build. Also still holding on Meta Ads MCP (needs a launch-status call from the product owner) and the static-rendering pass (deferred 4x now, real regression risk to auth if rushed).

Next: the low-KD comparison cluster (Windsor, Supermetrics, AgencyAnalytics, Whatagraph) is now essentially complete — next push shifts to either the remaining connector-matrix pages (pending Meta Ads confirmation) or the 12-post blog plan. Still no SE Ranking project wired up for askarlo.app (flagged 2026-07-10) — worth a human setting that up so future sessions can track real rankings instead of just KD/volume estimates.
